sourceOverview.notes: TTS: 30+ languages, 2M+ community voices, voice cloning from 15s. Developer-focused.

audit.priceRangeSummary: TTS about $15/M UTF-8 bytes; STT about $0.36/hour.
audit.limitsSummary: Voice/model creation and cloning supported. Community voice ecosystem is large.
audit.regionSummary: Fish Audio cloud; region detail limited.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: S2 Pro: 80+ languages with auto language detection. S1: 13 languages (EN, ZH, JA, DE, FR, ES, KO, AR, RU, NL, IT, PL, PT).
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Public ASR exists; exact official language matrix should be validated live.
audit.freeTierSummary: Trial/free usage may exist by account state.

supplementalResearch.title: 48. Fish Audio (China/US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 48. Fish Audio (China/US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. Open-source Fish Speech (Apache 2.0).

`s2-pro` and `s1` ($15/1M UTF-8 bytes, ~$1.25/hr of speech). **80+ languages**. 2M+ community voices. Voice cloning (10–30s audio). 50+ emotion tags. WebSocket streaming. Self-hosting available. Free monthly generations.
